title: MERIDIAN GAMBLING TREATMENT - 211info
text: EMERGENCE ODYSSEY MERIDIAN GAMBLING TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides problem gambling education and treatment, support groups, outpatient care (group and individual), referral services, concerned others/family support and education, and intervention. Individual counseling is available. Also offers aftercare, pretreatment, relapse prevention and support, and substance abuse treatment for those clients who may be co-addicted. Referrals are provided as needed. 2149 Centennial Plaza Suite 4 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing compulsive gambling and affected family members or partners Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Email (541) 741-7107 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 741-7107 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 2 blocks from LTD on Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Services: Gambling Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ODYSSEY COMMUNITY COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EMERGENCE ODYSSEY
